prompt: Locate the exact order “Lab Notebook Order” at Research Annex and tell me its stable ID, date, and status. Do not update it until I follow up. Write every date as YYYY-MM-DD and do not add details the tools did not return.

follow_up_turns.content: Set that order's date to 2026-10-22 and mark it pending. Do not change its location or notify anyone.
Correction: use 2026-11-08 for the date, but keep the pending status from my last instruction. Do not notify anyone.

stages.purpose: Identify the intended record while leaving it unchanged.
Apply the first follow-up's date and status together.
Honor the latest correction while preserving or revising status exactly as stated.

response_constraints: Base every reported field and confirmation on tool results.
Use the resolved target ID for both update turns; do not repeat the search after the correction.
Do not call the notification or cancellation tools.
Write every date as YYYY-MM-DD and do not add details the tools did not return.
Describe the final date and status from the latest instruction, not the superseded intermediate state.
